summary: Dual audit: SFX system + E2E full loop trace. 9 SFX findings (2 critical, 3 high, 4 medium). E2E: 6/7 CHKs pass, 1 deviation (stale spec), 2 arch issues found.

findings.description: BUG-SFX-AMB-ILES already in queue: amb_iles missing from SFXManager names[]. play_biome_ambient('iles') returns silence.
5 dead dice SFX (dice_shake, dice_roll, dice_land, dice_crit_success, dice_crit_fail) in names[] — D20 is a REMOVED system (bible: Systemes SUPPRIMES ~~D20~~). Wasteful startup generation.
DOUBLE SFX trigger confirmed: minigame_base.gd:84-89 AND game_controller_minigame.gd:100-102 both call play('minigame_success/fail'). Result: every minigame outcome plays the sound TWICE.
findings.fix: Removed SFX block from minigame_base._complete() — base class should not invoke global SFX, only game_controller_minigame.gd has full outcome context.

findings.description: ALL 10+ minigame scripts use get_node_or_null('/root/SFXManager') instead of direct SFXManager autoload. Fragile: if autoload name changes, silent failure. Pattern: mg_bluff_druide, mg_joute_verbale, mg_lame_druide, mg_negociation, mg_noeud_celtique, mg_oeil_corbeau, mg_pas_renard, mg_pile_ou_face, mg_roue_fortune, mg_tir_a_larc, mg_trace_cerf.
No SFX when Ogham is unlocked. _apply_unlock_ogham() (effect_engine:451) has no SFXManager.play('ogham_unlock') call. Registered sound 'ogham_unlock' exists but is never triggered from Ogham unlock.
No SFX for run end in ui_overlay_endscreen. show_end_screen() has no play('success') or play('fail') call. Player gets visual but no audio cue for run outcome.

MusicManager v1 (autoload: scripts/autoload/music_manager.gd) coexists with MusicManagerV2 (class: scripts/audio/music_manager.gd). AudioIntegration wires MusicManagerV2 but it is NOT connected to live game. MenuPrincipalMerlin uses get_node_or_null('/root/MusicManager') instead of MusicManager autoload.

No SFX for faction rep reaching key thresholds (50 = content unlock, 80 = ending unlock). _apply_faction_reputation() at effect_engine:414 applies delta but plays no audio feedback. Threshold crossings are silent.

AudioIntegration (scripts/audio/audio_integration.gd) references SFXEngine type not available as autoload — uses custom SFXEngine wrapper class. Not wired in any live scene. Dead architecture alongside GameFlowController.
findings.note: Low priority — remove or wire in future refactor

checklist.evidence: menu_3d_pc.gd:1333 — _start_new_game() → _glitch_transition('res://scenes/ParchmentPreRun.tscn'). NOT SelectionSauvegarde. SelectionSauvegarde is 'Continue' in old MenuPrincipal.tscn — the E2E task spec was written for the legacy 2D menu. Active game uses Menu3DPC → ParchmentPreRun → HubAntre (functional).
SelectionSauvegarde.gd:GAME_SCENE='res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn'. _go_to_scene() at lines 103,109,167,173 transitions to HubAntre. Reachable only via MenuPrincipal 'Continue' button — not via Menu3DPC.

broceliande_forest_3d.gd:9 — GAME_SCENE='res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn'. Lines 1227-1228: transition_to(target) after forest walk. Signal merlin_encounter_complete emitted at line 965. SFXManager.play('encounter') at 1045.

merlin_game_controller.gd:658-666 — checks result.run_ended, calls ui.show_end_screen(ending). MerlinGameUI.show_end_screen → UIOverlaysModule.show_end_screen → UIOverlayEndScreen.show_end_screen. Full chain intact.
ui_overlay_endscreen.gd:134 — btn_hub.pressed.connect(func(): PixelTransition.transition_to('res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn')). Direct hardcoded transition, works.

architecture_issues.issue: GameFlowController (scripts/core/game_flow_controller.gd) is a full phase manager (MENU→HUB→RUN→END_SCREEN) but is NOT an autoload and NOT instantiated in any live scene. The live game uses direct PixelTransition.transition_to() calls. This is dead architecture.

EndRunScreen.tscn uses EndRunScreenUI (scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd, signal return_to_hub) but GameFlowController expects EndRunScreen (scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd, signal hub_requested). Signal name mismatch — would break if GameFlowController ever wired.

e2e_audit.verdict: FUNCTIONAL — all 7 flow steps work in live game. GameFlowController + Run3DController architecture exists but is parallel/unused. No player-visible bugs in main loop.

invariants_checked.result: PARTIAL — dice_* have gen_ but D20 removed from game

invariants_checked.invariant: No double SFX trigger in minigames
Main game loop transitions are complete
invariants_checked.result: PASS — all 7 CHKs pass in active code path
